meta_description: Fast, reliable appliance repairs across Wembley by vetted engineers. Same-day or next-day service for washing machines, ovens, dishwashers and more.
hero_subheadline: Fast, same-day repairs from vetted local engineers
trust_statement: All engineers are vetted, insured, and local to Wembley

faqs.q: How quickly can you repair my appliance?
faqs.a: We offer same-day and next-day appointments across Wembley. Contact us to check availability in your area.

faqs.q: Are your engineers insured and vetted?
faqs.a: Yes — all engineers working in Wembley are fully insured, DBS-checked, and vetted before joining our network.

faqs.q: Do you offer a guarantee on repairs?
faqs.a: All repairs include a 3-month parts and labour guarantee as standard. Premium Members receive an extended 12-month guarantee.
